org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.base

Class BaseMode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,DroidViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.base.BaseMode

  • public class BaseMode
extends ActionMode<Figure,DroidViewGraphics2D,Color>
    This class implements a Mode that interpretes user inputs as selecting one or more figure. Clicking on a figure will select it.

    Mouse Interaction

    Mouse EventsAction
    Move on figuresChange the mouse cursor to indicates if they are resized by the user.
    Left click on figureSelect the figure. See below for details on the selection behavior.
    Left click on resizing handlerIf selected objects, delegate to ResizeMode.
    Left click on block figure and dragSelect the block figures if not already, and delegate to MoveMode.
    Left click on edge control point and dragSelect the edge and delegate to ControlPointMoveMode.
    Left click on edge, outside control point, and dragCreate a control point and delegate to ControlPointMoveMode.
    Left click on backgroundClear the selection
    Left click on background and dragDraw the selection rectangle
    Left double-click on block figureFire action-performed event
    Right click everywhereFire popup-performed event

    Keyboard Interaction

    KeysAction

    Deletion Behavior

    Method 1: Conditional deletion of the figure and its model object

    The figure f is associated to the model object a.

    If the parameter isAlwaysRemovingModelObjects, passed as parameter of the constructors, is true; then the method 2 is run in place of the method 1.

    If the parameter isAlwaysRemovingModelObjects, passed as parameter of the constructors, is false; then only the figure f is removed from the viewer. The model object a remains inside the associated graph model.

    Method 2: Inconditional deletion of the figure and its model object

    The figure f is associated to the model object a.

    The figure f is deleted from the viewer. The model object a is removed from the graph model.

    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Mahdi HANNOUN
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel

      • canExit

        public boolean canExit()
        Always false because I never want to get out of this mode.
        Overrides:
        canExit in class ActionMode<Figure,DroidViewGraphics2D,Color>
        Returns:
        always true if this mode can be dropped from the ActionModeManager stack, otherwise false.
